name: Franken Stein
alt_names: フランケン シュタイン
description: The eccentric yet incredibly talented doctor and meister who is hailed as the DWMA's strongest graduate in history. He later joins the academy as an instructor. While he is intimidating due to the greater-than-typical amount of madness within him, he is highly relied upon by [Death](https://anilist.co/character/8457/Shinigami) and is well-liked by his students. Formerly partnered with [Spirit Albarn](https://anilist.co/character/8462/Spirit-Albarn), he is now partnered with [Marie Mjolnir](https://anilist.co/character/15769/Marie-Mjolnir).
